switzerland.title: Discover Switzerland
switzerland.description: Intimate culinary and scenic tours through the heart of Switzerland. Limited to 12 guests for an unforgettable experience.

europe.title: Across Europe
europe.description: Experience the sweet side of Europe, from the Black Forest to Vienna's grand coffeehouses. A journey through 5 countries of culinary delights.

newzealand.title: New Zealand Adventures
newzealand.description: Discover the natural beauty and rich culinary culture of Aotearoa. From stunning landscapes to vibrant cities, experience New Zealand's food scene.

france.title: French Gastronomy
france.description: Explore some of the culinary treasures of France.

regions.noToursAvailable: No tours available for this region yet.
regions.regionDoesNotExist: The region you're looking for doesn't exist.

socialMedia.joinUsDescription: Join us on social media for travel tips, behind-the-scenes moments, and Swiss inspiration

hero.sub: Intimate culinary and scenic tours through the heart of Switzerland. Limited to 12 guests for an unforgettable experience.

different.title: What Makes Us Different
different.sub: We're not just another tour company. Our deep Swiss roots and passion for authentic experiences create journeys that connect you with the real Switzerland.

promise.title: The Appetite Journey's Promise
promise.body: Every tour is crafted with the eyes of a local, and the expertise of more than 30 years in the international culinary industry. We don't just show you Switzerland - we help you taste, feel, and understand it. From the distiller who becomes your friend to the chocolatier who shares family recipes, these are connections that last long after you return home.

smallGroups.title: Small Groups Only
smallGroups.description: Maximum 12 guests ensures personalized attention and authentic experiences.

culinary.title: Culinary Expertise
culinary.description: With more than 50 years combined culinary and hospitality experience, we know food and travel. We have the knowledge and connections to create unforgettable experiences.

hiddenGems.title: Hidden Gems
hiddenGems.description: Visit places tourists seldom see - from family-run distilleries to traditional artisans practicing centuries-old crafts. Discover the authentic Switzerland.

localKnowledge.title: Local Knowledge
localKnowledge.description: Benefit from the knowledge of someone who was born and raised in Switzerland mixed with the insight of an internationally experienced industry professional.

toursPage.title: Our Tours
toursPage.sub: Handcrafted journeys designed for travellers with taste.
toursPage.switzerlandSub: Food, wine and culture in the heart of the Alps.
toursPage.europeSub: Multi-country journeys across Europe's finest food regions.

tourPage.joinWaitlist: Join our waitlist for future departures →

gateway.whyChooseUsDescription: Every journey is crafted with passion, authenticity, and attention to detail.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our tours, or just want to say hello, feel free to reach out.
contact.name: Full Name
